summary: Replaced eight audited user-visible store-template lastError bodies with localized, resolution-guided keys and removed direct error.localizedDescription interpolation from those surfaces.
source_findings_closed: F01 TrainStore persist session save failure
F03 WriteStore persist note save failure

localized_keys.train.error.session.save: Couldn't save the session. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.write.error.note.save: Couldn't save the note. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.home.error.run.save: Couldn't save the protocol run. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.home.error.task.save: Couldn't save the task. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.home.error.protocol.save: Couldn't save the protocol. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.career.error.record.save: Couldn't save the career record. Free up storage and try again.
localized_keys.today.error.history.load: Couldn't load previous days. Close and reopen Owlory, then try again.
localized_keys.today.error.entry.save: Couldn't save today's entry. Free up storage and try again.

store_changes: TrainStore.persist now sets String(localized: "train.error.session.save") on save failure.
WriteStore.persist now sets String(localized: "write.error.note.save") on save failure.
HomeStore.persistRuns, persistTasks, and persistProtocols now use home.error.* localized keys.
CareerStore.persist now sets String(localized: "career.error.record.save") on save failure.
TodayStore.loadRecentEntries and persistCurrentEntry now use today.error.* localized keys.

locale_coverage.native_review_claim_for_new_keys: Not claimed. Each new review row has native_review.accepted=false and pending_native_review=true.
locale_coverage.prior_native_review_scope_preserved: The prior project-owner-reported native/fluent review remains scoped to the 419 entries present before 2026-05-20; each return file records 8 pending post-packet additions.

content_standard_update: docs/workflows/content-standards.md now records these five store-template fixes as complete and leaves only the separate WriteStore stage-conversion message and PatternStore visibility decision as remaining audited gaps.

diff_budget.reason: The slice required 8 keys across 19 Localizable.strings files plus 18 per-locale review return files. The queue cap was expanded rather than leaving locale parity or provenance incomplete.

scope_boundaries: Did not touch PatternStore failure visibility or copy.
Did not touch WriteStore source-note-stage conversion behavior or message.
Did not change readiness, scoring, persistence, or alert presentation logic.
Did not claim native/fluent review for the eight new non-English strings.

validation.python3 automation/context/build_context: passed; selected slice context rebuilt with max_files_changed=50
validation.make automation-check: passed (pyright 0 errors / 0 warnings; localization-review-drift-check 0 drift; 93 automation tests)
